title: Flutter App Development Internship
shortDescription: Build modern cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart while learning industry-standard development practices.
description: The Flutter App Development Internship provides hands-on experience in building cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart. Participants will learn UI development, widget design, navigation, state management, Firebase integration, JSON handling, and best coding practices through practical projects. By the end of the program, learners will have developed real-world applications and gained valuable experience in mobile app development.

title: AI-Powered Data Analysis Internship
shortDescription: Learn to analyze, visualize, and interpret data using modern AI-powered tools and data analytics techniques.
description: This internship introduces learners to AI-powered data analysis using modern tools and techniques. Participants will explore data cleaning, visualization, statistical analysis, and AI-assisted insights while working with practical datasets. The program helps learners develop analytical thinking and data-driven decision-making skills applicable in real-world business scenarios.

title: Prompt Engineering Research Program
shortDescription: Explore prompt engineering techniques and research methodologies for building effective AI-powered applications.
description: The Prompt Engineering Research Program focuses on understanding how large language models work and how effective prompts can improve AI-generated results. Participants learn prompt design strategies, AI research methods, evaluation techniques, and practical applications using modern generative AI tools. The program encourages experimentation and innovation in artificial intelligence.

title: Data Visualization Training Program
shortDescription: Transform complex datasets into meaningful visual insights using modern data visualization tools and techniques.
description: This training program teaches learners how to present data effectively using charts, dashboards, and interactive visualizations. Participants explore visualization principles, storytelling with data, dashboard design, and business reporting techniques. The program helps improve decision-making through clear and impactful data presentation.

title: Full Stack Web Development Internship
shortDescription: Develop complete web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies while following industry best practices.
description: The Full Stack Web Development Internship provides practical experience in developing responsive web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies. Learners gain knowledge of user interface design, databases, APIs, authentication, version control, and deployment. By completing real-world projects, participants build the skills required for professional full-stack development.
